title: helianthemum hirtum
intro: Helianthemum hirtum, also known as sticky rockrose, is a flowering plant species native to the mountainous regions of the western United States. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent properties, which can help treat wounds, skin irritations, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Helianthemum hirtum include reducing inflammation and relieving symptoms of fever, cough, and sore throat. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedies.
